# getascraper/how-to-scrape-messe-frankfurt

> Messe Frankfurt Exhibitor List Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts exhibitor lists from any Messe Frankfurt trade fair. Free tier available.

## Overview
- Messe Frankfurt scraper and trade fair exhibitor data extraction API
- Extracts: company name, address, contact details, hall and stand number, product categories
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-messe-frankfurt/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/messe-frankfurt-exhibitor-directory-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~messe-frankfurt-exhibitor-directory-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/messe-frankfurt-exhibitor-directory-scraper

## How it works
1. Choose a Messe Frankfurt fair by its event code, such as AMBIENTE or CHRISTMASWORLD
2. Optionally narrow the exhibitor list with a search query
3. Collect every matching exhibitor as one flat row, ready to export

## Target site characteristics
- Publicly viewable exhibitor directories, no login required
- Fairs range from a few hundred to several thousand exhibitors each
- Covers dozens of industries across Messe Frankfurt's global trade fair calendar

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://www.messefrankfurt.com/
- Any Messe Frankfurt trade fair with a public exhibitor directory, such as Ambiente, Christmasworld, and Creativeworld

## Pricing
- Free tier: included, first 50 results per run
- Paid: $4.39 per 1,000 exhibitor records

## Output schema (highlights)
- companyName, companyAddress, companyCountry: exhibitor identity and location
- companyEmail, companyPhone, companyWebsite: contact details, when published
- hallStands, productCategories, socialLinks: fair placement and category data

## Use cases
- Sales teams building exhibitor contact lists for outreach
- Market researchers tracking exhibitor presence across fairs
- Sourcing teams filtering exhibitors by product category

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-messe-frankfurt/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~messe-frankfurt-exhibitor-directory-scraper/issues
